issues.detail: The skill does not address error handling or edge cases for missing user input or unsupported platforms.
The skill references a Claude-specific file path, limiting compatibility with other AI agents.

scenarios.name: B2B SaaS founder weekly LinkedIn plan
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives generic frequency advice with no pillar percentages, no concrete hook text, and no batching workflow; treatment defines the five pillars with explicit percentages, writes specific hook lines per day, caps promotional at 5%, and prescribes a 2-3 hour weekly batching session with a daily 30-min engagement routine.

scenarios.name: Repurpose a single blog post into a week of Instagram and TikTok content
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggests cross-posting near-identical content (an anti-pattern per the skill) and lacks concrete hooks or platform-native formats; treatment extracts distinct insights per day, uses Reels/short-form TikTok with trending audio, gives specific hook lines, and batches creation on Sunday with platform-appropriate schedulers.
